summary: All 6 requested features verified: 1) 'Tee tarjous' button visible in toolbar with teal color (#4A9BAD), 2) Clicking 'Tee tarjous' without measurements shows error toast 'Ei mittauksia - lisää mittauksia ensin', 3) TarjousDialog opens when measurements exist, 4) All dialog fields present (Asiakas, Kohde, Lisätyö tunnihinta default=55, Lisätiedot), 5) Generate button disabled when Asiakas empty, enabled when filled, 6) PDF generation works successfully (toast: 'Tarjous PDF luotu!')

integration_issues.issue: CORS blocks company logo URL, fallback text logo is used instead
integration_issues.note: Fallback mechanism works correctly, shows 'J&B tasoitusmaalaus' text

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Toolbar.js - 'Tee tarjous' button with data-testid='create-tarjous-button' and bg-[#4A9BAD] class (teal color)
VERIFIED: App.js handleCreateTarjous - validates measurements.length > 0, shows error toast if empty
VERIFIED: TarjousDialog.js - All form fields with data-testids: tarjous-asiakas, tarjous-kohde, tarjous-lisatyo, tarjous-lisatiedot
VERIFIED: export.js exportTarjousPDF - Professional PDF with company info, customer info, grouped work items, prices with VAT, terms mentioning 'urakka- tai selontottoneuvottelussa'
ADDED: data-testid='tarjous-generate-button' to TarjousDialog generate button for better testability
seed_data_creation: None - tested by loading PDF, setting scale 1:50, and creating count measurement
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF takeoff and cost estimation app with new 'Tee tarjous' feature. To test PDF generation: 1) Load PDF file, 2) Set scale via calibration dialog (click scale button → 'Aseta mittakaava 1:50'), 3) Select tool and preset, click on canvas, 4) Click 'Tee tarjous' button, 5) Fill form, 6) Generate PDF. CORS blocks company logo URL but fallback works.

tests_executed.test: Tee tarjous button visible with teal color
tests_executed.details: Button has class bg-[#4A9BAD] and text 'Tee tarjous'
Shows 'Ei mittauksia - lisää mittauksia ensin' toast

tests_executed.test: Generate button disabled when Asiakas empty
tests_executed.details: Button is disabled when formData.asiakas is empty

tests_executed.test: Generate button enabled when Asiakas filled
tests_executed.details: Button is enabled after filling Asiakas field
Toast shows 'Tarjous PDF luotu!' after clicking generate
